judgment.summary: Coinbase maintains high gross margins and a strong cash position but faces significant headwinds from declining revenue and sharply negative growth estimates.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last reported EPS was -1.49 vs an estimate of 0.04 (miss), with the next earnings date on 2026-07-30.
positives: Gross margin of 85.5% — reflects high efficiency in core service delivery.
Total cash of $10.44B — provides a substantial liquidity cushion against $7.96B in total debt.
Free cash flow (TTM) of $2.41B — demonstrates the ability to generate significant cash despite top-line declines.
negatives: Revenue growth of -30.8% YoY — indicates a significant contraction in business activity.
Analyst growth estimate for the current FY is -72.5% — signals expected substantial deceleration.
Operating margin of -7.1% — shows the company is currently struggling to maintain operational profitability.
Beta of 3.38 — implies extreme price volatility for options traders.

news.paragraph: Coinbase has seen a 29% rise in its stock price over the past three months, though some analysts suggest the current valuation is expensive. The stock recently experienced a 6% slump amid a broader sell-off in digital asset stocks.
